reason: Correct Gambia PAYE to the GRA public annual schedule: GMD 0 to 36,000 at 0%, the next four GMD 10,000 bands at 5%, 10%, 15%, and 20%, and income above GMD 76,000 at 25%. PAYE uses gross employment income without deducting pension. Model SSHFC NPF and FPS separately and cap employer IICF at GMD 15 per month.

fixtureDeltas.reason: At GMD 1,000,000 annual gross, PAYE is calculated on gross through the published 25% top band and employee NPF is applied separately at 5%.
The large-value fixture now keeps PAYE on gross income at the published 25% top rate while NPF remains a separate employee deduction.
